area_program_compliance.notes: All 11 space types from the approved area program are reflected in the architectural design set. Clinical zones comply with COFEPRIS NOM minimum dimensions. Consultorios meet minimum 15 sqm COFEPRIS standard (designed at 20 sqm — exceeds minimum). Urgencias at 120 sqm meets COFEPRIS emergency area requirements. Clean/dirty corridor separation from the approved concept is maintained throughout the design set. Accessibility compliance matrix confirmed — all accessible routes, ramps, and restroom configurations meet COFEPRIS and NOM-001-STPS requirements.

structural_coordination_notes: Structural engineer engaged and preliminary coordination complete. Building is two-story concrete frame structure with flat roof. Foundation type: reinforced concrete raft foundation recommended by soil study (flat urban site, medium bearing capacity confirmed). Structural coordination sketch integrated into Phase 2 architectural drawings. Structural engineer to deliver coordinated drawings in Phase 3.

cofepris_compliance_phase2.clinical_area_minimum_dimensions: all spaces meet or exceed COFEPRIS NOM minimums
cofepris_compliance_phase2.medical_waste_flow: confirmed — dedicated waste corridor from clinical areas to service exit on north side of building
cofepris_compliance_phase2.preconsultation_status: COFEPRIS pre-consultation completed for private outpatient clinic category

engineering_disciplines_initiated: Structural (coordination sketch complete — full drawings Phase 3)
Electrical (single-line sketch for Phase 2 — full design Phase 3)
HVAC — clinical (pressure differential zoning concept confirmed based on clean/dirty corridor layout)
Medical gas systems (outlet locations identified in Phase 2 clinical plans)
